description: Standard 0.43 appearance/style settings shared by most input components. Paths are FLAT on the component model (no desktop./tablet./mobile. breakpoint prefixes — that structure is 0.45+). Components with hasStandardAppearance:true support the paths listed in their appearanceFieldPaths; full field definitions are below.

stylingBoxShape.note: stylingBox is a JSON *string*. Keys (all string values, px implied):

fields.label: Height
fields.description: CSS height (number = px, or any CSS size string). Also acts as max content height on inputs.

fields.label: Width
fields.description: CSS width (number = px, or any CSS size string)

fields.label: Hide border
fields.description: When true, border is not rendered

fields.label: Border Type
fields.description: Border style: solid | dashed | dotted | double | none ...

fields.label: Style
fields.description: JS script returning a CSSProperties object, e.g. return { backgroundColor: "#fff" };

fields.label: Margin & Padding
fields.description: JSON string of margins/paddings, e.g. "{\"marginTop\":\"8\",\"paddingLeft\":\"16\"}" — keys: marginTop/Right/Bottom/Left, paddingTop/Right/Bottom/Left
